summary: Cleaned up Dolphin SDK-related declarations by removing duplicate or misplaced prototypes, moving consumers from broad or local declarations toward proper Dolphin headers, and fixing a few declaration/type issues encountered while doing so. The PR explicitly aimed to remove declarations from functions.h and move toward compiling Dolphin code with -requireprotos.
what_changed: Removed several Dolphin prototypes from include/functions.h, including OSAllocFromHeap, OSReport, and OSGetConsoleSimulatedMemSize, reducing reliance on the catch-all functions header.

Added or corrected Dolphin header declarations: OSGetConsoleSimulatedMemSize was added to include/dolphin/os/OSMemory.h; OSAllocFromArenaHi replaced a duplicate OSAllocFromArenaLo prototype in include/dolphin/os/OSArena.h; PADTypeAndStatusCallback was added to include/dolphin/pad/pad.h.
Converted old Metrowerks-style fixed-address declarations to the project AT_ADDRESS macro, including __OSBusClock in OSTime.h and __OSModuleInfoList / __OSStringTable in OSLink.c.
Removed many duplicate local extern declarations from Dolphin source files such as OS.c, OSAlarm.c, OSExi.c, CARDUnlock.c, Pad.c, and __start.c.
Greatly reduced duplicate label forward declarations in src/dolphin/gx/GXTexture.c, deleting 124 repeated declaration lines while preserving the unique label prototypes needed by jump tables.
Marked file-local helpers as static where evidence showed they should not be globally declared, including Retry in include/dolphin/card.h and DoUnmount in CARDMount.c.
Added <dolphin/os/os.h> includes across many Melee source files that used OS functions such as OSPanic/OSReport instead of carrying ad hoc prototypes or depending on functions.h.
Updated gmmain.c to include Dolphin OS headers directly and cast OSGetArenaHi/OSGetArenaLo to intptr_t before subtracting, avoiding raw void-pointer arithmetic after using typed prototypes.

Changed CARDRdwr.c buffer increments from assignment to a cast expression target, e.g. `(u8*) card->buffer += CARD_SEG_SIZE`, into explicit assignment through a casted RHS, e.g. `card->buffer = (u8*) card->buffer + CARD_SEG_SIZE`.

No review comments were present in the provided slice; the only human text describes the intent: remove duplicate declarations, remove declarations from functions.h, and eventually get Dolphin code compiling with -requireprotos.
smart_moves: Focused on declaration ownership instead of just adding more local externs: symbols were moved toward the relevant Dolphin subsystem headers, making future prototype checking more feasible.
Used umbrella Dolphin OS includes in consumers that need OS APIs rather than keeping scattered one-off prototypes like OSPanic in gameplay files.
Reduced GXTexture jump-table noise without trying to rename unknown labels prematurely; this preserves matching-oriented label declarations while eliminating redundant duplicates.
Introduced AT_ADDRESS for fixed-address externs, making hardware/OS global symbols more consistent and portable across contexts than raw colon-address syntax.
Made static/internal helpers explicit where possible, shrinking the global declaration surface and documenting file-local linkage.
Fixed small type-expression issues exposed by stricter declarations, notably void-pointer arithmetic in gmmain.c and casted lvalue pointer increments in CARDRdwr.c.
decomp_lessons: When preparing for -requireprotos, prefer moving real prototypes into subsystem headers over accumulating local extern declarations in .c files.
Avoid using include/functions.h as a dumping ground for SDK declarations; Dolphin APIs should live in include/dolphin/... headers matching their subsystem.

Header cleanup can affect many unrelated gameplay files because old catch-all prototypes hid missing includes; expect broad include additions across fighter, stage, item, interface, player, and baselib code.
Duplicate forward declarations in decomp-generated or matching-heavy files can often be safely collapsed to one prototype per unique label if the declarations are identical.
For fixed-address OS variables, use the repository's AT_ADDRESS convention rather than compiler-specific address syntax when possible.
When adding correct typed prototypes, latent nonstandard C patterns may need cleanup, such as subtracting void pointers or assigning through casted lvalues.
Mark helpers static when their definition is file-local; this helps avoid incorrect public ABI assumptions during decompilation.
naming_conventions: Dolphin OS APIs keep official-style prefixes such as OSGetArenaLo, OSSetArenaHi, OSAllocFromArenaHi, OSGetPhysicalMemSize, OSGetConsoleSimulatedMemSize, OSGetTick, and __OSTimeToSystemTime.
Internal Dolphin symbols retain double-underscore names where appropriate, such as __OSBusClock, __OSModuleInfoList, __OSStringTable, __CARDGetDirBlock, and __CARDUpdateFatBlock.
Unknown assembly/jump-table labels remain address-like lbl_ names such as lbl_8033E7B4, lbl_8033E7C0, lbl_8033E7CC, and lbl_8033EBBC rather than being guessed.
File-local helper names like Retry and DoUnmount can remain semantically named but should be marked static when not exported.
Fixed-address declarations use `extern ... AT_ADDRESS(address)` syntax in headers/source rather than `symbol : address` syntax.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Collapsing duplicate label prototypes in GXTexture.c preserves jump-table declarations while reducing noise that can obscure matching work.
AT_ADDRESS was used for memory-mapped or fixed-location OS globals, improving declaration clarity without changing the intended addresses.
Explicit pointer casts in gmmain.c and CARDRdwr.c avoid relying on compiler extensions or ambiguous casted lvalue behavior, while retaining intended pointer arithmetic.

Local extern removal in asm-heavy OS files keeps only the prototypes needed near assembly blocks and relies on correct headers where available; evidence does not show any functional rewrite of the assembly itself.
follow_up_queries: Find remaining declarations in include/functions.h that belong in Dolphin subsystem headers.
Search for local `extern` prototypes in src/dolphin that could be replaced by proper includes before enabling -requireprotos.
Audit old fixed-address declarations using colon syntax and convert them to AT_ADDRESS where appropriate.
Search for duplicate lbl_ forward declarations in other jump-table-heavy files.
Identify gameplay source files that include <dolphin/types.h> only because they need OS function prototypes and switch them to narrower Dolphin OS headers.
